name: Andrew Gillum
subject: I'm running for Governor of Florida.
body:
Together, we can change Florida.
#
Friends -
Growing up, my grandmother always told us to go to school, mind our teachers, get our lesson, and bring that education home - for our brothers, our baby sister, and the kids in our neighborhood.
**She wanted us to know we were responsible for more than ourselves -- we are also responsible for our family and our neighborhood, and everyone around us.**
My grandmother knew then what I know now -- that if we were going to get anywhere, we would get there together. And that's why I'm coming to you today, with a humble heart and a whole lot of hope, as we launch this campaign for Governor of Florida. Because I know that our only path to victory is one we're willing to travel together.
[**Add your name now to join our people powered campaign, and help us bring it home for Florida.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33e1/9e00690/492e5e92/24035677/2704565355/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/announcement?source=em20160302-full2")
Like so many of you, I am here today because of the very policies Republicans say are "destroying" our great state of Florida. I grew up on food stamps in Miami and Gainesville. My parents weren't college educated, but they both worked hard: my mother as a bus driver and my father as a construction worker. As Governor, I will work to create jobs that pay a living wage on every rung of the income ladder.
Our family struggled with being cash poor, but I still grew up rich in opportunity. Though the public schools I attended weren't always in the best part of town, they were always filled with the best teachers. I wouldn't be writing you today as a candidate for Governor of Florida had it not been for the encouragement and help I received from Ms. Alexandria at Westwood Middle School and Mrs. Awbrey at Gainesville High School. **They went above and beyond the requirements of their job, like so many teachers do, to ensure that I became the first person in my family to graduate college.**
But I knew it wasn't enough for me to become the first in my family to go to college -- it was my duty to make sure I wasn't the last. The Democratic Party and progressive philosophy created a way up and a way out for even families like mine, and so when I began my career in public service at just 23 years old, I did so as a progressive Democrat. My experiences reflected those of average, everyday Floridians. And I knew those people deserved a champion.
For me, being a Democrat has always been about welcoming folks just as they are. This was the party that advocated for my parents growing up, that didn't demonize them or label them as lazy. Instead, they fought for progress for all of us. And that's what I've worked to do in my time on the Tallahassee City Council and as Mayor of Tallahassee.
When marriage equality was won at the Federal level and we had Florida county after county after county saying that they would no longer issue marriage licenses to anybody, just so they didn't have to do it for gay couples. So I welcomed couples to our great city of Tallahassee to celebrate their love and commitment to one another with marriage.
When President Trump's executive order targeted immigrants in our cities, I protested loudly and proudly, and fought to stop him from tearing these families apart. This concept of having to choose between security and compassion is absolutely false. We can have both, and we must fight for both.
In fact, I have worked tirelessly to make Tallahassee a safe haven for all -- and I have done so without resorting to irrational discrimination. When I refused to repeal ordinances that prevent shooting guns in a public park, the gun lobby sued me. They thought they could intimidate me with threats of personal fines, with two years of litigation, and with attacks from right-wing interest groups. **They were wrong. Just last month, we won the battle to keep our parks safe.**
My pastor talks about it in the terms of being the thermostat versus the thermometer. There are enough people who are prepared to take the temperature. There are not enough people who are willing to set it. I think I've demonstrated up to this point that I've never had to take the temperature in order to do the right thing.
**I believe we are at a time in our state and our nation 's history that requires not just people who quietly agree on these critical issues we are facing, but people who are going to be champions, who will get out and lead on them.**
That's why I'm asking you to join together with us from the very beginning, to help us prove that we have that power, that hope, and that determination to rebuild this state into one that works for all of us, no matter what we look like, where we come from, what we believe, or whom we love.
[**Let us know if you 'll be joining together with us for this historic campaign by adding your name right here and right now.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33e1/9e00690/492e5e92/24035677/2704565355/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/announcement?source=em20160302-full2")
Thank you for being a part of this journey. I look forward to traveling the state and meeting with you and the rest of the team in the coming weeks.
Bring it home,
Mayor Andrew Gillum
Candidate for Florida Governor

**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33e1/9e00690/492e5e92/24035676/2704565355/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-march2017?refcode=em20170302-full2-button")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33e1/9e00690/492e5e92/24035609/2704565355/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33e1/9e00690/492e5e92/24035608/2704565355/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33e1/9e00690/492e5e92/2403560b/2704565355/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

"" Thank you for being a part of this journey. I look forward to traveling the state and meeting with you and the rest of the team in the coming weeks. Bring it home, Mayor Andrew Gillum Candidate for Florida Governor "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
While under oath, Jeff Sessions stated: "I did not have communications with the Russians." Last night, we found out that was untrue. | __ Friend - while under oath, Jeff Sessions stated: "I did not have communications with the Russians." Last night, we found out that was untrue.

It was already overwhelmingly clear that Attorney General Sessions shouldn't be charged with investigating his Trump team colleagues, but now his own involvement with Russia is also in question.

The Russia situation has escalated with each passing day. It's no longer plausible that this growing cloud over our government can be addressed through a closed-door, classified review by the Intelligence Committees. An independent investigation must begin immediately.

[**And that's only the beginning. Attorney General Sessions should resign his office and Donald Trump should release his tax returns and cooperate fully with efforts to shine the light of transparency on Russia's involvement in our elections --Add your name if you agree >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b05/70cdc2ba/474eaad8/397e62b/1634672982/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-on-sessions-should-resign?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+And+thats+only+the+beginning+Attorney+Ge&utm_campaign=em030217&source=em030217")

We need to know how far this goes. First Flynn, now Sessions, concealed their interactions with Russia. And the Trump administration continues to deny reports that campaign staff had repeated contacts with Moscow during the election.

This is an unprecedented situation.

Faith and confidence in the institutions of our democracy are at stake. We must demand nothing less than full transparency and accountability. If the Trump Administration has nothing to hide, they should have nothing to fear from full disclosure.

[**Add your name now to demand Attorney General Jeff Sessions resign as our nation's top lawyer and Donald Trump open his tax returns to public scrutiny. >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b05/70cdc2ba/474eaad8/397e628/1634672982/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-on-sessions-should-resign?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+now+to+demand+Attorney+Gen&utm_campaign=em030217&source=em030217")

Thanks for standing up on this important issue,

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b05/70cdc2ba/474eaad8/397e629/1634672982/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em030217&source=em030217")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b05/70cdc2ba/474eaad8/397e626/1634672982/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em030217&source=em030217") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Glenn Davis
subject: BREAKING: New Poll Results
body:
Glenn Davis for Lt. Governor

Friday, March 3,
2017

Peter,

I'm extremely excited to report that
I'm currently leading the field for the Republican nomination to
be Virginia's next Lt. Governor. A recently conducted poll shows
our campaign leading with 42% support among likely Republican
primary voters!

The poll was conducted by:

If you want to read the poll itself:
CLICK HERE

It's time Virginia is #1 again in jobs
and the economy.

Onward to VICTORY!

Team Davis

P.S. My campaign is on the road
everyday to win. Can you please donate $5, $10, $25 or $100 to
help?

>

Authorized by Davis for LG

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c425/4067b0a/2d27c3f52/7e7c97e3/157259955/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170303_dnc_nd&source=em_20170303_dnc_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c425/4067b0a/2d27c3f52/7e7c97e1/157259955/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170303_dnc_nd&source=em_20170303_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Six weeks later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Democrats still won’t approve our full cabinet. |

Friend, Six weeks ago, our team asked you to sign a petition telling Democrats to stop obstructing the approval of our cabinet... They STILL haven’t approved it. No president’s cabinet in history has faced the same obstructionism as ours. Now the only thing that can stop their obstructionism is YOU. Democrats were elected to the Senate to work for you -- the American voter. And now they need to hear from millions of American voters across the country that it’s time to stop obstructing us and to get to work. Add your name to our Official Petition to tell Democrats to stop obstructing our America First Agenda. We can’t let the Democrats get away with obstructing the will of the AMERICAN PEOPLE. We need our full cabinet in place to fully implement our agenda to Make America Great Again! This isn’t even about party politics. It’s about doing what’s RIGHT for the American people. Now please sign our Official Petition telling Democrats to stop obstructing our America First agenda. Thanks, Donald J. Trump President of the United States
ADD YOUR NAME

name: Chris Van Hollen (via DSCC.org)
subject: an update on Jeff Sessions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We're tracking allegations that Attorney General Jeff Sessions lied under oath. Here are the facts we have right now: The attorney general of the United States must have the people's trust as an honest and independent broker who upholds the law.
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3d0/2b07114c/5ac637dd/736bb96b/1005299341/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-sessions-resign?source=PT-20170303-VanHollen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")
Friend --

Yesterday, Attorney General Jeff Sessions announced his intention to recuse himself from any executive branch investigations into the Trump campaign.

That's a positive development, but it's too little too late. The faith and confidence of the American people in our institutions is at stake.

The attorney general of the United States must have the people's trust as an honest and independent broker who upholds the law.

**In failing to tell the truth -- under oath -- about his conversations with Russia, Jeff Sessions has failed to meet that standard, and he must resign.**

**[Join me and my Democratic colleagues and add your name if you agree that the attorney general needs to step down.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3d0/2b07114c/5ac637dd/736bb96b/1005299341/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-sessions-resign?source=PT-20170303-VanHollen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

We are a nation of laws. And the attorney general is the chief law enforcement officer, chief lawyer and chief prosecutor in our government.

That's what makes Jeff Sessions' case of amnesia before the Senate Judiciary Committee so problematic.

Whatever public trust he had is gone. Sessions has damaged his credibility and fundamentally impaired his ability to run the Department of Justice.

In the coming days he should testify again before the Judiciary Committee so we can determine exactly how many conversations with Russian officials took place, when they happened, and what was discussed.

But regardless of what we find out, for the good of the country, he must resign.

**If you agree, speak out here:**

**[http://dscc.org/demand-sessions-resign](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3d0/2b07114c/5ac637dd/736bb96b/1005299341/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-sessions-resign?source=PT-20170303-VanHollen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Thank you,

Senator Chris Van Hollen
DSCC Chair

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3d0/2b07114c/5ac637dd/736bb96a/1005299341/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3d0/2b07114c/5ac637dd/736bb965/1005299341/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3d0/2b07114c/5ac637dd/736bb964/1005299341/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Tom Perez
subject: What are your ideas?
body:
Make your voice heard today.
---
**Share your thoughts and ideas with the new DNC Chair.

** **[LET TOM KNOW](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Let-Me-Know1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+LET+TOM+KNOW&utm_campaign=em_20170303_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170303_tp_v2s2")**
Friend --

I want to take a quick moment to say thanks for the warm welcome to the DNC. It's been a busy first week on the job, and it means a lot to know that I have so many great grassroots Democrats like you standing by my side.

It's clear that we have our work cut out for us. The American people are counting on us to fight back against Trump and the GOP, and I'm ready to get going -- **[but first, I want to hear from you.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Let-Me-Know1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+but+first+I+want+to+hear+from+you&utm_campaign=em_20170303_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170303_tp_v2s2")**

We're all in this fight together, so I want to make sure supporters like you have an opportunity to share your thoughts and input on how our party should proceed into the future.

What are your ideas? What are the most important challenges we should be tackling? How can we strengthen our party in your community?

**Click right here, and let me know:**

**[LET TOM KNOW](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Let-Me-Know1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+LET+TOM+KNOW&utm_campaign=em_20170303_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170303_tp_v2s2")**
Thank you so much for joining the conversation.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c43e/4067b0a/2d26a0b11/7e7c9f6a/4081408972/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170303_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170303_tp_v2s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c43e/4067b0a/2d26a0b11/7e7c9f6b/4081408972/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170303_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170303_tp_v2s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c43e/4067b0a/2d26a0b11/7e7c9f68/4081408972/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170303_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170303_tp_v2s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c43e/4067b0a/2d26a0b11/7e7c9f69/4081408972/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170303_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170303_tp_v2s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: Not fit to serve
body:
Recusing himself is not enough
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Attorney General Jeff Sessions has recused himself from an ongoing investigation into the Trump Administration's ties with Russia after lying under oath about his communications with senior Russian officials.
We need a Justice Department that will give the American people the facts about Russia's ties to the Trump campaign. There will be no justice for Americans at the Department of Justice with an Attorney General who is so willing to lie. Recusing himself is not enough. Jeff Sessions must resign.
[**Sign our petition demanding Attorney General Jeff Sessions step down and calling on Congress to appoint a special prosecutor to investigate Trump 's troubling ties to Russia.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a7f/43f17890/de30e79b/62001645/371451243/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/jeff-sessions-must-resign?source=em170303-full")
This scandal is yet another example of the Trump Administration's failure to fight for the American people. We are tired of being sold out to special interests. It's time for Congress to appoint an independent voice who will investigate the depth of the administration's ties to Russia and the hackers who attempted to undermine our election system.
[**If you agree that Jeff Sessions must resign as Attorney General, sign our petition today.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a7f/43f17890/de30e79b/62001645/371451243/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/jeff-sessions-must-resign?source=em170303-full")
Our system is broken. Trump claims he is making America great again, but in his America, things are only great if you're already at the top. We need a country that has opportunity for everyone, led by leaders with integrity who will fight for us. Join us in demanding a political system that represents us.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[ADD YOUR NAME»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a7f/43f17890/de30e79b/62001645/371451243/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/jeff-sessions-must-resign?source=em170303-full")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a7f/43f17890/de30e79b/62001642/371451243/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a7f/43f17890/de30e79b/62001643/371451243/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a7f/43f17890/de30e79b/62001640/371451243/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Hoosier Leadership
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
_**County Re-Organization**_ Once every four years, precinct committee members gather in each of our 92 counties to choose their county Republican leadership teams. I hope during the meetings that take place Saturday, everyone takes a moment to reflect on our successes, but most importantly, consider the bright future ahead of us. It’s because YOU elect good people to office that Indiana thrives and it’s because of YOU that we will take our state to the Next Level.

\- Kyle
---
|
---
| | _**Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**_
---
| [ ](http://)
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
| Treasurer Kelly Mitchell got a special delivery of a milk bottle to commemorate the 101st Running of the Indianapolis 500 from IndyCar driver Stefan Wilson, while Superintendent of Public Instruction Dr. Jennifer McCormick visited students at Christel House and Attorney General Curtis Hill spent time with President Donald Trump in the Oval Office!
---
|
---
| **News You Can Use**
Secretary of State Connie Lawson's [office discusses hacking attempts on Indiana electoral systems by DHS](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3294136eb5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Treasurer Kelly Mitchell [announces CollegeChoice 529 fee reduction](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9c6a368c09&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Events This Weekend & Next Week**
[Friday, March 3](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=856d8a92c9&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Washington Township Lincoln Day Dinner with Congresswoman Susan Brooks
[Friday, March 3](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4816d5e17c&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Warren Township Lincoln Day Dinner with Speaker Brian Bosma
[Friday, March 3](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=506f6b1075&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Noble County Lincoln Day Dinner with Governor Eric Holcomb
[Tuesday, March 7](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fb5447e32f&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Madison County Lincoln Day Dinner with Attorney General Curtis Hill
[Thursday, March 9](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=80fc4b7a65&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Pike Township GOP Club Lincoln Day with Governor Eric Holcomb & Sen. Mike Delph
[Friday, March 10](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8a3b98e240&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Dearborn County Lincoln Day Dinner with Governor Eric Holcomb
[Friday, March 10](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b8f1c58941&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Gibson County Lincoln Day Dinner with Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch

|

---

**President Trump's nominee to head up the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services, Hoosier Seema Verma, cleared the Senate Finance Committee on her way to a full vote in the U.S. Senate.**
| [Read More](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a01354ac55&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read More")
---
| |

**Proven Republican leadership was recognized again this week when U.S. News & World Report ranked Indiana #1 for government administration in the country. A great testament to our Republican leadership!**
